mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, menu_id FROM permissions ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.description, p.menu_id FROM permissions p LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON p.id = up.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} OR up.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.description, p.menu_id FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permissions (name, code, description, menu_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{menuId})
mapper.update: UPDATE permissions SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, description = #{description}, menu_id = #{menuId} WHERE id = #{id}
